plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-427 RP14.P01.M04.S14-RP14.P02.M01.S16 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-427 implements descriptor-only coverage that closes the RP14.P01 model foundation phase (M04 Secondary Workflow Slice tail, M05 Permission And Audit Binding, M06 Synthetic Fixture Set, M07 Test And Golden Case Set, M08 Hermes Evidence Packet, M09 Claude Review Packet, M10 Closeout And Next Handoff) and opens the RP14.P02 foundation (M00 Scope Inventory, M01 Contract Draft head) as nine descriptor-only sections over 150 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H14), Claude review packet (C14), and CP00-428 handoff, without opening settlement, origination, allocation, or working credit runtime or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-427 descriptor-only RP14 settlement-core pack passes independent read-only review; all coverage/distribution and no-write/no-real-data/Claude-non-final-approver/Hermes-non-runtime boundaries verified, production_ready correctly false. One cosmetic P3 test-title typo; no blocking issues.

findings.title: Test title says "RP13" but pack/program is RP14
findings.details: The test description string reads "CP00-427 plan binding covers the planned 150 RP13 p01 closeout p02 foundation units". CP00-427 is an RP14 (Partner Settlement) pack; RP13 is only the upstream program. The analogous CP00-426 test at line 54 correctly says "RP14". Cosmetic copy/paste typo in a test name only — no effect on assertions, runtime, or data.
findings.recommendation: Change "150 RP13" to "150 RP14" in the test title at line 113. Non-blocking.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-427 settlement core p01 closeout p02 foundation descriptor pack
